description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on every pull request and push to the master branch. The workflow has two jobs: test and lint. The test job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix strategy across multiple Python versions, checking out the code, setting up Python, installing dependencies with pip and poetry, running pytest tests, and uploading coverage to Codecov for specific Python versions. The lint job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.10, installs black, and runs a lint check.
